evidence.snippet: **Use:     This bungee is suitable for airplanes in the 1 to 10lb. range depending on wing area. It will launch a 1lb. small plane at speeds over 100mph., or a large 14lb. plane at about 25mph. This size is the most popular and is also used as a zip start, or Zip/Zoom for most open class gliders.Item Number:  Stnd1/2x24Price:   $90**

tagline: Designs and manufactures bungee-based launch systems (Hosemonster Bungees, Zipstart Catapults, Complete Highstarts), UAV rail launchers, and parachute recovery systems for small unmanned aircraft. Listed past customers include Sandia, INL, Lockheed, and US military branches, but current production contracts and NDAA/Blue UAS status are not publicly documented. HQ location unknown.
